sessionStart.bash:
mkdir -p .copilot-hooks; if [ ! -f .copilot-hooks/config.json ]; then python3 -c 'import json, pathlib, re, os, datetime as dt; root=pathlib.Path(".copilot-hooks"); slug=re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9._-]+","-", pathlib.Path.cwd().name.lower()).strip("-") or "workspace"; cfg={"schema_version":1,"log_schema":"oh-my-copilot-hook-log-v1","project_slug":slug,"workspace_root":os.getcwd(),"created_at":dt.datetime.now(dt.timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00","Z"),"default_source":"plugin","log_files":{"events":".copilot-hooks/events.jsonl","session":".copilot-hooks/session.log","tools":".copilot-hooks/tools.log","warnings":".copilot-hooks/warnings.log"}}; (root/"config.json").write_text(json.dumps(cfg, indent=2)+"
")'; fi; python3 -c 'import json, pathlib, os, datetime as dt; now=dt.datetime.now(dt.timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00","Z"); root=pathlib.Path(".copilot-hooks"); event={"schema_version":1,"source":"plugin","event":"sessionStart","timestamp":now,"cwd":os.getcwd(),"workspace_root":os.getcwd()}; (root/"events.jsonl").open("a").write(json.dumps(event)+"
"); (root/"session.log").open("a").write(f"source=plugin event=sessionStart timestamp={now} cwd={os.getcwd()}
")'

postToolUse.bash:
mkdir -p .copilot-hooks; if [ ! -f .copilot-hooks/config.json ]; then python3 -c 'import json, pathlib, re, os, datetime as dt; root=pathlib.Path(".copilot-hooks"); slug=re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9._-]+","-", pathlib.Path.cwd().name.lower()).strip("-") or "workspace"; cfg={"schema_version":1,"log_schema":"oh-my-copilot-hook-log-v1","project_slug":slug,"workspace_root":os.getcwd(),"created_at":dt.datetime.now(dt.timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00","Z"),"default_source":"plugin","log_files":{"events":".copilot-hooks/events.jsonl","session":".copilot-hooks/session.log","tools":".copilot-hooks/tools.log","warnings":".copilot-hooks/warnings.log"}}; (root/"config.json").write_text(json.dumps(cfg, indent=2)+"
")'; fi; python3 -c 'import json, pathlib, os, datetime as dt; now=dt.datetime.now(dt.timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00","Z"); root=pathlib.Path(".copilot-hooks"); event={"schema_version":1,"source":"plugin","event":"postToolUse","timestamp":now,"cwd":os.getcwd(),"workspace_root":os.getcwd()}; (root/"events.jsonl").open("a").write(json.dumps(event)+"
"); (root/"tools.log").open("a").write(f"source=plugin event=postToolUse timestamp={now} cwd={os.getcwd()}
")'
